name: allenfancy-gan--ai-nano-banana-ima
description: Image generation with IMA Open API using only Nano Banana series: Nano Banana, Nano Banana Pro, Nano Banana 2. Budget (Nano Banana2 512px), balanced (Nano Banana2/Pro), premium (Nano Banana Pro 4K). Native aspect_ratio (1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4). Requires IMA API key. Bundled script: scripts/ima_image_create.py.
